review_policy.name: fast_batch_gates
review_policy.scope: between-batch gates for current v1.20.1 run; final readiness remains full cumulative review
review_policy.source: latest explicit user Run Control; supersedes risk-adjusted two-reviewer batch policy

between_batch.scope: current batch diff plus directly affected foundational interfaces
between_batch.gate_question: Is it safe to build the next batch on this foundation?
between_batch.github_bots: observe asynchronously; wait only on failure or final landing
between_batch.remediation: affected focused tests then mandatory closing gates; no repeat council for straightforward fixes
between_batch.evidence_reuse: reuse only when affected source, config, fixtures, CLI version, model route, and invariant are unchanged
between_batch.live_connector_recheck: only when connector-affecting code changed and the next batch depends on it
